chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-801 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For orders on maintainability of main case. ------ 18.09.2025 Mr. Pardeep Kumar B. Butani, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Riaz Hussain Khoso, Deputy Attorney General, Pakistan. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh a/w Khadim Hussain Kalwar, Executive Engineer, Provincial Highways Division, Larkana. ------ Through this petition, the petitioner has prayed for the following relief(s): a. To direct the respondent No.4 to sanction the amount of ADP’s to all the concerned/executing agencies within time, as there is right of all Contractors who are registered by the Government of Pakistan. b. Costs of the petition may kindly be awarded to the petitioners. c. Any other relief available under the circumstances of the petition may also be granted in favour of petitioner as this Honourable Court deems fit and proper. Since the prayer so made in the instant petition is in direct conflict with Article 29 of the Constitution, Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 and being policy matter cannot be adjudicated upon by this Court unless any appropriate order is passed by the concerned or competent authority. Hence this petition, in view of the above legal position, is devoid of merits, therefore, is hereby dismissed. Judge Judge Manzoor
